content: Anyone hauling Tumalo -> Madras early Sat? @midori.kelley I'm leaving 6am from my place if you want to convoy
Yes please. Hikari + Sundowner 2H. I'll text you on personal. Meeting at Madras Cafe for biscuits before load-in.
ADDENDUM 2026-10-22: gate-in moved to 09:30 AM Pacific (was 09:00). Body of confirmation PDFs is OUT OF DATE - 09:30 SUPERSEDES 09:00. Please update your printouts.
Confirmed - updated my checklist. Hauling with @tara.redhawk
Reminder: vendor lead times for Zoetis fall boosters are running 5+ weeks on the IBR/BVD bolus SKU. Plan your Q4 orders accordingly. De-identified discussion only.
